pageContext.name: Vampirella #3 J. Scott Campbell Virgin "Crimson Blood" Red Variant
pageContext.description: The J. Scott Campbell 'Crimson Blood' Edition, available only on Vampirella #3, allows you a view of the artist's dynamic linework in Vampirella-appropriate Bloody Red!  Seduction of The Innocent Book Three of Twelve: Vampirella's struggle to deal with the complex emotional consequences of a major disaster caused by her enemies is exacerbated by an unexpected visit from her mother, Lilith, with whom Vampi has a complicated relationship. But has the Mother of All Vampires come to help or destroy her daughter? And will Vampirella's hapless therapist survive the encounter?  Jeffery Scott Campbell is an American comic book artist. He was initially known professionally as Jeffery Scott, but is best known as J. Scott Campbell. He rose to fame as an artist for Wildstorm Comics, though he has since done work for Marvel Comics, and the video game industry.  If you're a fan of Vampi, Mr. Campbell, or both, you'll surely want this limited cover as part of your collection! Ships bagged and boarded with a Dynamite Certificate of Authenticity, only 25 pieces ever produced!
